yumpling.

[  registry  |  8.8.1999  |  12.17.1999  |  2.12.2000  ]

latest updates

2/21/00
It's been over a week since the little guy came out. We're slowly figuring out what the cries mean, how to breastfeed and wash him, etc. His eyes burn deep into my heart.
2/12/00
All hail Jaden Orion Berkeley McDonald-Peltier Yu! He came out at 10:39 pm and entered into the arms of two loving parents, two of their dear friends, and a great midwife. He should have a good life. Check out some photographs.

Last updated 2/21/00.
